name: Structure of the Circular-Dyadic Convolution Error
summary: arXiv:2607.15293v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Dyadic and circular convolution can both be computed in $O(N\log N)$ time using the Hadamard transform and the FFT-computed discrete Fourier transf...
description: arXiv:2607.15293v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Dyadic and circular convolution can both be computed in $O(N\log N)$ time using the Hadamard transform and the FFT-computed discrete Fourier transform (DFT), respectively. The Hadamard transform is preferable for its real-valued sign flips, yet its substitution for the DFT introduces algebraic error. We present three complementary results that c...
author: Ben Fauber, Alireza Moradzadeh
